titleStmt.title: SII 34.368: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 368. Kunnāṇḍārkōyil, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the second gōpura, left of entrance, in the Parvatagirīśvara temple.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, Viruppaṇa-Uḍaiyar, Bhāva, Vaigasi 2 = A.D. 1394, February 25.

This records the decision of some groups (uḍaṉkūṭṭam) of the rathakāras assembled from a big area including Rājagembīra-vaḷanāḍu, Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, Pāṇḍikulāśani-vaḷanāḍu and Nittavinōda-vaḷanāḍu, to give some fees in money from each of their households in each year and on the occasion of marriages to the temple of Tirukkuṉṟākkuḍi-nāyaṉār in view of their seeking asylum and protection from the god of the temple bearing the title of ‘kaḷḷa-vēḷaikkāṟaṉ’.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī viruppaṇa Uṭaiyarukku cellā
niṉṟa pāvaka varuṣam vaikāci mātam 2 nāḷ ciyaciṅkakulaikāla vaḷanāṭṭu vaṭapaṉai kkā nā
ṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirukkuṉṟākkuṭi Uṭaiya nāināṟku Uttama cōḻaṉ kaṟpaṇaiyāṉ kūṭṭamum tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati perumāḷ Uṭa
ṉkūṭṭamum Aḻakiya tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyiṉār Uṭaṉ kūṭṭamum teṉkarai yirācakempīravaḷa nāṭṭu Irācai rā
ca vaḷanāṭum pāṇṭikulācani vaḷanāṭum nitta viṉōta vaḷanāṭum Iṉṉāṭṭil mūṉṟu vakaippaḷḷi nālvakai Aṟuvakaitto
ḻil liratakāṟar camaiya caṅkētikaḷum (muta)mutalikaḷum niṟaivaṟa niṟaintu kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi kaḷḷa vēḷaikkāṟaṉ Eṉṟu caraṇam
pukutukaiyil Eṅkaḷukkuḷḷa nilattaāṉi piṟāṇaāni maṟṟum Eṟpayaṟpaṭṭa vitaṉāṟ putaiyaṅkaḷum yivarkaḷē cātitu tara
kkaṭavarkaḷākavum nāṅkaḷ tirukkuṉṟākkuṭi Uṭaiya ṉāyaṉāṟkuc camaiyaṅkuṭutta paṭi varuṣam Oṉṟukku kuṭikku Oru Āṭura
veṭṭum kalliyāṇattukku Oru tiruvāḻi mōtiram Oru Āṭura paṇam Oṉṟum patieṇ pūmiyum maṇkalatakattu veṇ
(ṇ)kalam Eṭuttu taṇṭikkoḷḷak kaṭavarkaḷākavum Iṟpaṭikku Itu patieṇpūmi yiratakāṟac camaiyakkaṇakku Aukkaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 34.368 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
